seoTitle: How to Update an Employee's Email in QuickBooks Online
metaDescription: Update an employee's email address in QuickBooks Online in a few quick steps so payroll notices and reports reach the right inbox.
intro: An outdated employee email address can mean missed payroll notifications or reports going nowhere. This guide covers how to update an employee's email address in QuickBooks Online, a task the source tutorial says takes under three minutes. It's aimed at small business owners and HR staff who need employee records to stay current.

steps.heading: Access employee records
steps.body: Open the employee section of QuickBooks Online where individual staff details, including contact information, are stored.

steps.heading: Find the employee to update
steps.body: Locate the specific employee whose email address needs changing from your list of employee records.

steps.heading: Edit the email address
steps.body: Update the email field with the employee's current address, replacing the outdated one.

steps.heading: Save your changes
steps.body: Confirm the update so QuickBooks Online applies the new email address to future notifications and reports.

steps.heading: Double-check the update
steps.body: Verify the change saved correctly, since an incorrect email can cause payroll notices to go to the wrong place.

faq.question: Why does an employee's email address matter in QuickBooks Online?
faq.answer: Accurate email addresses ensure payroll notifications, pay stubs, and reports reach the right person without delay.

faq.question: How long does updating an employee email take?
faq.answer: The process is quick — the source tutorial covers it in under three minutes, since it's a straightforward edit to an existing record.

faq.question: Can employees update their own email address?
faq.answer: This depends on your account setup and permissions; in many cases an admin or HR staff member handles the update.

faq.question: What happens if I don't update an outdated email?
faq.answer: Payroll notifications and reports may fail to reach the employee, which can cause missed communications or confusion.

faq.question: Is this feature useful for companies with large teams?
faq.answer: Yes, businesses managing many employees benefit from knowing how to quickly update contact details as staff information changes.
